STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_LOAN_CURSE_CARD.d:
When drawn, gain [gold]50[/gold] gold. 
At the end of your turn, if this card is in your hand, lose [gold]20[/gold] gold.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_MOONLIT_GAZE_CARD: At the end of your turn, transfer one of your debuffs to all enemies.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_NONEXISTENCE_CARD:
Your ability card cost is reduced by [blue]1[/blue]. 
When you play an ability card, gain [blue]8[/blue] block. 
Your positive effects are doubled.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_DEATH_HARVEST_CAR:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Heal HP equal to unblocked damage
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_FULL_ASSAULT_CARD: Add 1 [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Die Die Die+|Die Die Die}[/gold] to all players' hands.
When you [gold]channel[/gold] an orb, other players will also [gold]channel[/gold] the same orb.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_NO_TURNING_CARD.d:
End one player's turn. 
That player gains 3 [gold]Block[/gold] per card in hand. 
Next turn, gain energy equal to their remaining hand size.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_ALL_HANDS_CRASH_C:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to all enemies. 
For each other player, increase damage by {ExtraDamage:diff()}. 
Fill all players' hands with [gold]Debris[/gold].
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_TOMB_RAIDER_GANG_: All players choose 1 card from their Exhaust pile and put it into their hand.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_TEACH_AND_LEARN_C: Whenever you play a [gold]Power card[/gold], each other player gains the same power.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_CURSED_BLADE_PLUS:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
For each other [gold]Curse[/gold] in your deck, increase damage by {ExtraDamage:diff()}.
The first time this is played each combat, stun the target.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_GENSHIN_FORM_CARD:
Transform cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold], [gold]Discard[/gold], and [gold]Exhaust[/gold]: Powers become [gold]Rolling Boulder[/gold], Attacks become [gold]Giant Rock[/gold], and Skills become [gold]Offering[/gold].
Whenever you lose HP, allies heal that much HP.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_SNAKE_GOD_FORM_CA: Whenever your Attacks deal damage, also apply that much [gold]Poison[/gold].
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_STAR_GOD_FORM_CAR: Whenever your Attacks deal damage, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Star[/gold].
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_VAKUU_FORM_CARD.d: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold], heal [blue]{VakuuFormPower:diff()}%[/blue] of your Max HP (minimum [blue]1[/blue]), then [gold]Vakuu[/gold] takes over your turn.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_CARD_MECH_GOD_FORM_CAR: Whenever you [gold]Evoke[/gold] an Orb, gain [blue]1[/blue] temporary [gold]Focus[/gold].
